description: The GridTexture component is used to generate a grid of lines with a background color to use in materials.

fields.BackgroundColor: The color of the background before ``Grids`` are layered on top.
fields.Grids: A list of Grids of lines that get layered on top of each other in order.

usage: Attach the component and provide a ``BackgroundColor`` and add some items to ``Grids`` to generate the texture. Then add to any ITexture2D slot like in materials for example.
